title: brain maintain [--apply] — --json success output
description: Vault maintenance: turns orphans, broken links, and stale content into proposals. Non-mutating PREVIEW by default (no sinks); --apply drives each remediation directly through the v2 mutation order (runMutation → commitPaths), exactly like `enrich`. v2 (#335, ADR-0003): the Tier-3 review gate is retired — destructive remediations apply directly (git revert + brain sync is the undo), there is no review-pending mode and no exit 6. --dry-run + --apply ⇒ exit 5.

findings.description: Maintenance findings and their proposed remediation.

destructive.description: true ⇒ the remediation removes content (v2: applied directly regardless; git is the undo).

x-atlas-contract.summary: Maintain the vault (orphans/broken-links/stale ⇒ proposals): non-mutating preview by default; --apply lands each remediation directly (v2: no tier gate, no review-pending).

flags.description: Perform the mutation (direct apply per remediation); without it, emit a non-mutating preview.
Caller-supplied idempotency key; a repeat --apply with the same key + request-hash returns the existing run rather than starting a duplicate (registry idempotency: key-accepting).

sideEffects: apply: one direct commit per remediation onto refs/heads/main via the mutation order + projection fold
prohibitedEffects: no review-pending park — every remediation applies directly (git is the undo)

errorCodes.when: the vault repo is missing or unreadable
another maintenance op holds the vault lock
